'''tozakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanned|xanned]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanned|xanned]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tozakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozakithi|tozakithi]] || [[word:tozakiji|tozakiji]] || [[word:tozakishi|tozakishi]] || [[word:tozakiki|tozakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozakuthuthu|tozakuthuthu]] || [[word:tozakujuju|tozakujuju]] || [[word:tozakushushu|tozakushushu]] || [[word:tozakukuku|tozakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozakuthu|tozakuthu]] || [[word:tozakuju|tozakuju]] || [[word:tozakushu|tozakushu]] || [[word:tozakuku|tozakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozakufthuf|tozakufthuf]] || [[word:tozakufjuf|tozakufjuf]] || [[word:tozakufshuf|tozakufshuf]] || [[word:tozakufkuf|tozakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozakethe|tozakethe]] || [[word:tozakeje|tozakeje]] || [[word:tozakeshe|tozakeshe]] || [[word:tozakeke|tozakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozakothotho|tozakothotho]] || [[word:tozakojojo|tozakojojo]] || [[word:tozakoshosho|tozakoshosho]] || [[word:tozakokoko|tozakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozakotho|tozakotho]] || [[word:tozakojo|tozakojo]] || [[word:tozakosho|tozakosho]] || [[word:tozakoko|tozakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozakofthof|tozakofthof]] || [[word:tozakofjof|tozakofjof]] || [[word:tozakofshof|tozakofshof]] || [[word:tozakofkof|tozakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfthÃŸf|tozakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfjÃŸf|tozakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfshÃŸf|tozakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfkÃŸf|tozakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|tozakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|tozakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|tozakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|tozakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfthÃŸf|tozakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfjÃŸf|tozakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfshÃŸf|tozakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfkÃŸf|tozakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfthÃŸf|tozakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfjÃŸf|tozakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfshÃŸf|tozakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tozakÃŸfkÃŸf|tozakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozakÃḊthÃḊ|tozakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:tozakÃḊjÃḊ|tozakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:tozakÃḊshÃḊ|tozakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:tozakÃḊkÃḊ|tozakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozakathatha|tozakathatha]] || [[word:tozakajaja|tozakajaja]] || [[word:tozakashasha|tozakashasha]] || [[word:tozakakaka|tozakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozakatha|tozakatha]] || [[word:tozakaja|tozakaja]] || [[word:tozakasha|tozakasha]] || [[word:tozakaka|tozakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozakafthaf|tozakafthaf]] || [[word:tozakafjaf|tozakafjaf]] || [[word:tozakafshaf|tozakafshaf]] || [[word:tozakafkaf|tozakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tozakasha|tozakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tozakshÃḋasha|tozakshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tozakroasha|tozakroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tozakmuasha|tozakmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tozakyaasha|tozakyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotozaknkshÃḋasha|gotozaknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotozaknkroasha|gotozaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotozaknkmuasha|gotozaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotozaknkyaasha|gotozaknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tozazakasha|tozazakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tozazakshÃḋasha|tozazakshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tozazakroasha|tozazakroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tozazakmuasha|tozazakmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tozazakyaasha|tozazakyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotozazaknkshÃḋasha|gotozazaknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotozazaknkroasha|gotozazaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotozazaknkmuasha|gotozazaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotozazaknkyaasha|gotozazaknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tezÃḊkasha|tezÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tezÃḊkshÃḋasha|tezÃḊkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tezÃḊkroasha|tezÃḊkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tezÃḊkmuasha|tezÃḊkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tezÃḊkyaasha|tezÃḊkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotezÃḊknkshÃḋasha|gotezÃḊknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotezÃḊknkroasha|gotezÃḊknkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotezÃḊknkmuasha|gotezÃḊknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotezÃḊknkyaasha|gotezÃḊknkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tozfakasha|tozfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tozfakshÃḋasha|tozfakshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tozfakroasha|tozfakroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tozfakmuasha|tozfakmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tozfakyaasha|tozfakyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotozfaknkshÃḋasha|gotozfaknkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotozfaknkroasha|gotozfaknkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotozfaknkmuasha|gotozfaknkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotozfaknkyaasha|gotozfaknkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
